agents.name: alpha
agents.description: Pack leader. Delegates all work, orchestrates agents, maintains logs. Never implements directly.

agents.name: peter
agents.description: Defines new roles and creates agent files. Works with Scout to build capable specialists.

agents.name: scout
agents.description: Researches skills, tools, and best practices needed for new roles. Reports findings to Peter via Alpha.

agents.name: sigma
agents.description: Owns all SQLite database operations: queries, schema evolution, migrations, data integrity, backups, and project lineage database support.

agents.name: architect
agents.description: Designs the eval-first planning workflow, artifact chain, gates, and specialist roster for AI product development.

agents.name: forge
agents.description: Implements all TypeScript/Node.js modules for the orchestration pipeline, data transformers, and type-safe interfaces.

agents.name: quill
agents.description: Generates PRDs, engineering specs, API docs, documentation templates, and engineering handoff packages.

agents.name: sketch
agents.description: Creates architecture diagrams, ERDs, sequence diagrams, and flowcharts using Mermaid and Graphviz.

agents.name: eval
agents.description: Designs and implements Python evaluation frameworks, test harnesses, quality metrics, and automated validation scripts.

agents.name: pipeline
agents.description: Owns GitHub Actions workflows for validation, testing, artifact generation, and quality gates.

agents.name: framer
agents.description: Takes human briefs and produces scoped Problem Definition Documents with testable success criteria.

agents.name: planner
agents.description: Produces execution-ready Build Plans from approved PRDs, diagrams, and eval specs.

agents.name: anvil
agents.description: Owns the Rust backend layer of Wolf Pack Mission Control: Tauri commands, rusqlite SQLite access, file watching, IPC bridge.

agents.name: scribe
agents.description: Maintains persistent memory files at pack and project level. Synthesizes raw DB data into useful, compressed knowledge that survives across sessions.

agents.name: sentry
agents.description: Validates builds before release. Tests cross-layer integration (frontend/backend/database), performs user acceptance testing, catches regressions, and documents test results.

agents.name: interviewer
agents.description: Conducts structured interviews to extract project requirements. Produces Intake Briefs for the pack pipeline.

agents.name: auditor
agents.description: Systematically analyzes codebases for cross-layer integration issues—field name mismatches, null/undefined gaps, IPC violations, type safety holes—and produces actionable audit reports.

agents.name: cloud
agents.description: Owns all Cloudflare edge infrastructure: Workers runtime, Hono routing, D1/KV/R2 bindings, Cron Triggers, session management, Web Push, and edge middleware.

agents.name: pixel
agents.description: Owns all user-facing interface work: SolidJS components, uPlot charts, PWA/Service Worker, offline-first UX, accessibility, and mobile-first responsive design.

agents.name: seo
agents.description: Owns all search engine optimization: on-page, technical, local, content SEO, content architecture (siloing, internal linking), and SEO auditing.

agents.name: geo
agents.description: Owns optimization for AI answer engines: citation optimization, content structuring for AI consumption, multi-platform strategies (ChatGPT, Perplexity, AI Overviews), GEO auditing.

agents.name: schema
agents.description: Owns all schema.org and structured data: JSON-LD generation, type selection, rich results optimization, schema-content alignment, validation, and entity graph architecture.
